name: my-neuro
description: This project lets you create your own AI desktop companion with customizable characters and voice conversations that respond in just 1 second. Features include long-term memory, visual recognition, voice cloning and LLM training. Compatible with various Live2D customizations.
summaryZh: This project lets you create your own AI desktop companion with customizable characters and voice conversations that respond in just 1 second. Features include long-term memory, visual recognition, voice cloning and LLM training. Compatible with various Live2D customizations. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
